Some workbook cells contain cached Excel error strings; normalize and unit-test formulas in application code.

Lists

module_map.Static data to extract: Resource types, speedup time units, state buff options
module_map.Player state to persist: Server/state age, VIP/buffs, current inventory resources, general speedups, construction/research/training speedups
module_map.Calculator outputs: Resource sufficiency, speedup sufficiency, next bottleneck

module_map.Workbook sheet(s): Construction + building sheets Furnace, Barricade, Command Center, Coal Mine, Embassy, Infirmary, Hunter's Hut, Infantry Camp, Iron Mine, Lancer Camp, Marksman Camp, Research Center, Sawmill, Shelter, War Academy
module_map.Static data to extract: Per-building level rows, resource costs, FC/RFC costs, build times, prerequisite building requirements
module_map.Player state to persist: Current and target level per building; active buffs; resources/speedups
module_map.Calculator outputs: Remaining resources/time to target, prerequisite chain, FC10 plan, SVS construction points

module_map.Workbook sheet(s): Chief Gear & Charms, New Chief Gear Data, Chief & Hero Data
module_map.Static data to extract: Gear level sequence, level number, alloy, polishing solution, design plans, amber, stats/power if retained
module_map.Player state to persist: Current and desired level per gear slot; inventory/chest exchange balances
module_map.Calculator outputs: Upgrade material gaps, pack/chest conversions, SVS points

module_map.Workbook sheet(s): Chief Gear & Charms, Charms Data, Chief & Hero Data
module_map.Static data to extract: Charm level sequence, guides/designs/secrets costs, slot mapping, charm stats/power
module_map.Player state to persist: Current and desired level per charm slot; charm material inventory
module_map.Calculator outputs: Charm upgrade costs/gaps and exchange planner

module_map.Workbook sheet(s): Heroes, Chief & Hero Data, Hero Rally Setup
module_map.Static data to extract: Hero generations, class/type, rarity, star/shard requirements, expedition stats, rally/garrison role rules
module_map.Player state to persist: Owned/unlocked heroes, current/target stars, shard balances, hero unlock state
module_map.Calculator outputs: Shard gaps, generation coverage, rally/garrison setup recommendations

module_map.Static data to extract: Gear XP tables, mastery/essence stone levels, mythic gear/mithril requirements, gear slot/category mappings
module_map.Player state to persist: Current and desired levels/mastery per hero gear piece; XP/mithril/stones
module_map.Calculator outputs: Gear XP/material gaps and priority view

module_map.Static data to extract: Pet level/advancement costs by pet, food/manuals/potions/serum, SVS point values
module_map.Player state to persist: Current and desired pet levels; pet material balances
module_map.Calculator outputs: Pet upgrade cost gaps, future pet planning, SVS contribution

module_map.Static data to extract: Tier points, base/adjusted training time, resource costs by troop type/tier, promotion/upgrade data
module_map.Player state to persist: Current troop counts by type/tier, target counts, training speed
module_map.Calculator outputs: Training/upgrade resource/time, SVS troop points, best points per second

module_map.Workbook sheet(s): T12 Exalted Unlock & Research, T12 Exalted Data
module_map.Static data to extract: T12 research costs I/II/III, unlock item costs, steel/RFC/shards/resource/time/power/stat tables
module_map.Player state to persist: Current/desired research levels, steel/RFC/shards, research speed
module_map.Calculator outputs: T12 unlock path, research material gaps, adjusted days/time

module_map.Workbook sheet(s): Dawn Academy (Experts), Dawn Academy Alternate Layout, Cyrille, Agnes, Holger, Romulus, Fabian, Baldur, Valeria, Ronne, Kathy
module_map.Static data to extract: Expert affinity costs, common/specific sigils, books, learning XP/time, skill costs/effects/power
module_map.Player state to persist: Expert current/desired affinity and skill levels, sigil/book balances
module_map.Calculator outputs: Expert upgrade costs, learning speedups, skill benefit comparison

module_map.Static data to extract: Tier costs, return distributions, expected return, return per FC, weekly cost/return
module_map.Player state to persist: Available FCs, desired tier strategy, weekly attempts
module_map.Calculator outputs: Expected RFC return and optimal tier strategy

module_map.Static data to extract: SVS point rules and daily activity mapping
module_map.Player state to persist: Planned upgrade quantities by day, Valeria skill level, buff days
module_map.Calculator outputs: Prep-week point forecast and best-day recommendations

module_map.Static data to extract: Hero type/role matrix by generation, rally/garrison lead ratios, troop split formulas
module_map.Player state to persist: Unlocked heroes, troop composition, alliance ratios
module_map.Calculator outputs: Rally/garrison team templates and troop split recommendations

gaps.Why it matters: Official changelog after the workbook adds Flame Tech unlocked after required state age and Helios Troops; no matching workbook sheets were found.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Extract unlock rules, tech tree, costs, stats, prerequisites, and state-age gates from official/community sources and screenshots.

gaps.Why it matters: New system grants Collection Points/levels and rewards; workbook has no Collection/Gallery data.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Capture skin catalog, point values, level thresholds, reward tables, and owned-skin state.

gaps.Why it matters: Workbook has Research Center building costs, but not full general/economy/battle research trees.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Build separate research_nodes table with branch, node, level, resource/time costs, prerequisites, stats.

gaps.Gap / validation item: Full War Academy research beyond T12/Exalted
gaps.Why it matters: Workbook covers T12/Exalted tables; the requested dashboard should include all War Academy research where applicable.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Separate T12/Exalted from any Helios/War Academy tech and add unlock gates.

gaps.Why it matters: Workbook may miss releases after its last update.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Use app version history, official Discord announcements, in-game screenshots, and community sheets.

gaps.Why it matters: Workbook uses Excel formulas and contains cached #N/A/#REF! outputs; web dashboard should not replicate spreadsheet errors.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Rebuild formulas in backend/domain code with unit tests for each module.

gaps.Why it matters: SVS, Icefire Warhymn, Frostfire Mine and other events can change.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Store scoring rules as versioned data with effective_date and source_url.

gaps.Why it matters: Many systems unlock by state age and season.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Add state_age_days, season, furnace_level, troop_unlock gates to prerequisites.

gaps.Why it matters: Workbook appears based on Zerethusta community calculator; need provenance before publishing copied tables.
gaps.Research / extraction approach: Track source_url, source_author, retrieved_at, confidence, and permission/attribution per imported table.

Dawn of Wisdom - Expert Treasure Pack

Many expert skills have prerequisites (some require a minimum number of total skill levels acquired for that expert, some require minimum Affinity levels.  I think I was able to max Cyrille at level 70.1 aka Close 1).  I don't have all that data, so just assume you'll have to bring up all skills roughly equally or…  Find out what you can pull off as you level up.                                                                                                                                                             -Z

Training/Promoting troops is more valuable per point than the speedups are, especially if you are upgrading troops that are one level below your maximum

All the orange cells have data validation to limit the hero type to the slot.  It's likely easier to type and let it filter than scroll through.  The hero columns will update as you unlock them on the "Heroes" sheet.
If these turn red it's because you have the same hero in multiple saved rallies.  You may or may not have enough unlocked to avoid this.
This needs some work and I haven't had a lot of time to do the manual fixing of all the data validation
Note: Not all data has been validated, be warned it may be incorrect (but it does seem to pass the sniff test) ~ Z
